scoping_rules.tasks: Primary view: FR → Requirement narrative + ACs → Design narrative + file paths → Task list. Used at PRESENTING_TASKS confirmation.
scoping_rules.requirements: FR → Requirement narrative + ACs → (design column shows 'pending') → (tasks column shows 'pending')
scoping_rules.architecture: FR → Requirement narrative + ACs → Design narrative + file paths → (tasks column shows 'pending')
scoping_rules.design: FR → Requirement narrative + ACs → Design narrative + file paths → (tasks column shows 'pending')

requirement_column.narrative: Write 2-4 sentences describing what the FR requires in plain language. Include the core behavior change and why it matters.
requirement_column.details: Below the narrative, list each AC on its own line as 'AC-NNN-NN: brief description'. Keep AC descriptions to one line each.
requirement_column.example:
Validate task coverage before PRESENTING_TASKS
so uncovered requirements are caught.

AC-001-01: validateTaskCoverage returns
  structured result
AC-001-02: uncovered items trigger
  re-generation before presenting

design_column.narrative: Write 2-4 sentences describing what changes in the codebase. Name the affected modules, patterns, and contracts. Explain the architectural impact.
design_column.details: Below the narrative, list affected file paths as 'path/to/file (NEW|MODIFY)'. One file per line.
design_column.example:
Adds coverage validation to the analysis
confirmation flow. Introduces a validator
result model with covered / uncovered /
orphan outputs.

src/core/tasks/task-validator.js (NEW)
src/claude/agents/roundtable-analyst.md
  (MODIFY)

tasks_column.format: List each related task as 'TNNN brief-description' on its own line. Keep descriptions to 3-5 words.
